title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lendingkart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
